requirement_topic.en: EMC, Power Quality, and 50 Hz Grid Compatibility for EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: 电动汽车充电设备的EMC、电能质量与50 Hz电网兼容性
requirement_topic.zht: 電動汽車充電設備的EMC、電能品質與50 Hz電網兼容性

summary.en: Sri Lanka operates a 50 Hz, 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase grid. EV chargers must be configured for 50 Hz operation with appropriate voltage and frequency input ranges. EMC requirements for EV chargers under IEC 61851-21-1 cover conducted and radiated emission limits and immunity requirements. CEB requires EV charger installations to comply with harmonic limits and power factor requirements to protect grid power quality. High-power fast chargers may require active power factor correction (APFC) or harmonic filters to meet CEB distribution grid requirements.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡采用50 Hz、单相230 V / 三相400 V电网。电动汽车充电设备须配置为50 Hz运行，输入电压和频率范围适当。IEC 61851-21-1对电动汽车充电设备的EMC要求涵盖传导和辐射发射限值及抗扰度要求。CEB要求电动汽车充电设备安装符合谐波限值和功率因数要求，以保护电网电能质量。大功率快充设备可能需要有源功率因数校正（APFC）或谐波滤波器，以满足CEB配电网要求。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡採用50 Hz、單相230 V / 三相400 V電網。電動汽車充電設備須配置為50 Hz運行，輸入電壓和頻率範圍適當。IEC 61851-21-1對電動汽車充電設備的EMC要求涵蓋傳導和輻射發射限值及抗擾度要求。CEB要求電動汽車充電設備安裝符合諧波限值和功率因數要求，以保護電網電能品質。大功率快充設備可能需要有源功率因數校正（APFC）或諧波濾波器，以滿足CEB配電網要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-21-1: Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 21-1: EMC requirements for on-board charger
IEC 61000-3-2: Limits for harmonic current emissions
IEC 61000-3-3: Limitation of voltage changes and flicker
CEB grid power-quality requirements for commercial loads

summary.en: China also uses a 50 Hz grid, so grid frequency compatibility is nominally consistent. However, Chinese EMC standards for EV chargers (GB/T 18487.3, GB/T 17626 series) differ from IEC 61851-21-1 and IEC 61000 in test methodology and limit values. Chinese EMC test reports to GB standards are not automatically recognised as satisfying IEC-based Sri Lanka requirements.
summary.zh: 中国同样采用50 Hz电网，因此电网频率兼容性名义上一致。但中国电动汽车充电设备EMC标准（GB/T 18487.3、GB/T 17626系列）在测试方法和限值上与IEC 61851-21-1和IEC 61000有所不同。按中国GB标准出具的EMC测试报告不能自动认定满足斯里兰卡基于IEC的要求。
summary.zht: 中國同樣採用50 Hz電網，因此電網頻率兼容性名義上一致。但中國電動汽車充電設備EMC標準（GB/T 18487.3、GB/T 17626系列）在測試方法和限值上與IEC 61851-21-1和IEC 61000有所不同。按中國GB標準出具的EMC測試報告不能自動認定滿足斯里蘭卡基於IEC的要求。

gap.en: Chinese GB EMC test reports for EV chargers do not automatically satisfy IEC 61851-21-1 and IEC 61000-based SLSI / CEB requirements. Exporters must obtain IEC 61851-21-1 EMC test evidence from an accredited laboratory and confirm that high-power charger harmonic emissions and power factor comply with CEB distribution grid requirements before commercial deployment in Sri Lanka.
gap.zh: 电动汽车充电设备的中国GB EMC测试报告不能自动满足IEC 61851-21-1和IEC 61000基础的SLSI / CEB要求。出口商须从认可实验室取得IEC 61851-21-1 EMC测试证据，并在斯里兰卡商业部署前确认大功率充电设备的谐波发射和功率因数符合CEB配电网要求。
gap.zht: 電動汽車充電設備的中國GB EMC測試報告不能自動滿足IEC 61851-21-1和IEC 61000基礎的SLSI / CEB要求。出口商須從認可實驗室取得IEC 61851-21-1 EMC測試證據，並在斯里蘭卡商業部署前確認大功率充電設備的諧波發射和功率因數符合CEB配電網要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IEC 61851-21-1 EMC compliance expected by SLSI; CEB harmonic and power-factor limits apply for grid-connected charger installations
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under GB/T 18487.3 for domestic Chinese EV charger market

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB EMC test reports for EV chargers do not satisfy IEC 61851-21-1 and IEC 61000 requirements expected by SLSI and CEB. Obtain IEC-based EMC evidence and confirm harmonic and power-factor compliance with CEB grid requirements before Sri Lanka market deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 电动汽车充电设备的中国GB EMC测试报告不满足SLSI和CEB期望的IEC 61851-21-1和IEC 61000要求。在斯里兰卡市场部署前，需取得基于IEC的EMC证据，并确认谐波和功率因数符合CEB电网要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 電動汽車充電設備的中國GB EMC測試報告不滿足SLSI和CEB期望的IEC 61851-21-1和IEC 61000要求。在斯里蘭卡市場部署前，需取得基於IEC的EMC證據，並確認諧波和功率因數符合CEB電網要求。
